$comment: P1 input: the verified move map for the os-reshape. Produced by the P0 survey (5 parallel readers + completeness critic; all depth entries independently verified). Move zones: (a) harness/sandbox -> harness/loop|guard + apps/_drafts, (b) governance/enforcement -> governance/checks, (c) scripts -> .system/sync, (d) harness/releases/*.json -> .system/releases (render.mjs STAYS in harness/).

depthTable.rootDerivationLine: L26: const DEFAULT_ROOT = resolve(HERE, '..', '..')  → governance/checks/ keeps depth 2 — OK
L26: export const REPO = process.env.HARNESS_ROOT ? resolve(process.env.HARNESS_ROOT) : resolve(HERE, '..', '..', '..')  → harness/guard/confinement/ keeps depth 3 — OK (env override exists)
L32: export const REPO = process.env.HARNESS_ROOT ? resolve(process.env.HARNESS_ROOT) : resolve(HERE, '..', '..', '..')
L24: export const REPO_ROOT = resolve(HERE, '..', '..', '..')  (view.mjs imports REPO_ROOT from here)
L29: const DEFAULT_ROOT = resolve(HERE, '..')  → .system/sync/ is depth 2: MUST become resolve(HERE, '..', '..')

L32: keyFile = join(dirname(fileURLToPath(import.meta.url)), '..', '.supabase-key')  → MUST become '..', '..'; L26 import '../harness/…' → '../../harness/…' (and the sandbox segment changes under (a))

runtimeRefsBrokenByMove.pointsTo: governance/enforcement/doctor.mjs — DANGER: if the path goes stale this fails SILENTLY GREEN (spawn succeeds, node exits 1 with empty stdout, catch falls back to findings:[] → ok:true)

runtimeRefsBrokenByMove.code: if (existsSync(join(root, 'harness/sandbox', target, 'contract.json'))) return { resolved: true, via: 'sandbox' }

runtimeRefsBrokenByMove.pointsTo: harness/sandbox/classifier/index.mjs — wrapped in try/catch: after a move the import fails SILENTLY and the check passes vacuously (targets list empty)
harness/sandbox/orchestrator/index.mjs — same silent fail-open as line 65
the sandbox-containment/self-admission guard — goes inert for rows moved to harness/loop|guard (and checkComponents ERRORs declared-but-absent if registry paths aren't updated in lockstep)
top-level allowlist for checkUndeclared — 'scripts' entry goes stale; '.system' is NOT listed (no WARN today only because dirHasCode() is non-recursive)
harness/releases/<hv>.json — checkReleaseConsistency is FAIL-CLOSED: move (d) without updating this = hard ERROR 'release-missing' → CI red
harness/releases/<X.Y>.json — checkVersionBumpOnChange is FAIL-OPEN here: move (d) silently DISABLES version-bump enforcement (returns [])
harness/releases/<v>.json pin confirmation (fail-open; activeRelease still returns v)
harness/releases/ pin listing — fail-open → [] → version-tag-release-divergence detection silently degrades
harness/releases/<hv>.json — fail-open → release-untagged drift detection silently disabled
harness/sandbox/loop-store/index.mjs — relative import breaks on EITHER the sandbox move or the scripts move (from .system/sync/ it needs '../../')
<repo>/.supabase-key — one '..' assumes depth 1; from .system/sync/ it resolves to .system/.supabase-key → key never found → sync silently skips
repo root — from .system/sync/ this resolves to .system/ → lock/verify/unlock operate on a nonexistent record/ (protectedFiles → [] → silently locks nothing)
repo root — one '..' assumes scripts/ is depth 1

scripts/sync-supabase.mjs — ALSO the already-installed launchd plist (~/Library/LaunchAgents/com.osr.dashboard-sync.plist) has the OLD absolute path baked in; the 30-min dashboard sync dies until the script is re-run
test discovery over harness/ governance/ scripts/ — after (c) the scripts tests silently vanish from CI (find prints an error but node's exit code wins); needs '.system' added
harness/releases/ owner-review rule — silently stops matching after (d); needs /.system/releases/ row
governance/enforcement/ owner-review rule — silently stops matching after (b); needs /governance/checks/ row
orchestrator component row — declared-but-absent ERROR from doctor if not updated
investigator component row (contract-only, no tests field)
scripts/install-managed-hooks.sh — file does not exist today (planned row); textual staleness under (c)
versioning.spaces.harnessRelease.releases (descriptive field; doctor uses its own hardcoded path)
confinement control declaration in the environment registry
its own path in the (dormant) wrap-the-session usage line
canonical top-level schema — '.system' would be flagged STRUCTURE_DRIFT (WARN-only); note scripts/ and web/ ALREADY warn today
sibling component — breaks ONLY if (a) splits session-feedback and orchestrator into different folders (loop vs guard); survives if they move together

runtimeRefsBrokenByMove.code: import { newTrace, span, stamp, fourTuple } from '../tracer/index.mjs'
import { newTrace, span, fourTuple, stamp, activeRelease, componentVersion } from '../tracer/index.mjs'  (also lines 25-27: ../loop-store, ../classifier, ../estimator)

runtimeRefsBrokenByMove.pointsTo: steering doc — also lines 5 (harness/sandbox/LOOP.md) and 34 (harness/sandbox/ candidate rule)

runtimeRefsBrokenByMove.code: node harness/sandbox/orchestrator/index.mjs --demo … (also 20, 31, 44, 62, 63: sandbox paths; 52, 58-61: governance/enforcement paths)

testRefsBrokenByMove.pointsTo: asserts orchestrator resolves via the harness/sandbox contract probe — fails after (a) (would resolve via 'registry')
tmp-dir fixtures that mirror the harness/releases layout the production checks read — must move in lockstep with (d)
fixtures for checkSandboxContainment — update in lockstep if the check is retargeted under (a)

testRefsBrokenByMove.code: mkdirSync(join(root, 'harness/releases'), { recursive: true })  (87-88: manifest + pin fixtures)
testRefsBrokenByMove.pointsTo: tmp fixtures mirroring the releases layout reconciler reads — lockstep with (d)
sibling loop-store — split-only caveat (same for pipeline.test.mjs:7, orchestrator.test.mjs:7, session-feedback.test.mjs:10)
own-dir CLI spawn — move-safe; BUT the CLI test transitively spawns the real doctor via orchestrator L43, so (b) makes it report a false-green doctor result

silentFailureModes:
SCOPE: all runtime .mjs under harness/, governance/, scripts/ plus configs (.claude/, .github/, *.json) and the shell script; web/ only reads Supabase (no repo paths); node_modules excluded. Files with NO root derivation and no move-zone literals: schema-validate.mjs (pure), classifier/index.mjs, estimator/index.mjs, filter.mjs, intake.mjs, sync.mjs, view.mjs, pipeline/index.mjs, session-feedback/index.mjs, statusline.mjs (these last six reach the repo only via sibling imports / ledger's REPO_ROOT). Test files deriving root (doctor.test L19, schema-validate.test L10, no-ghost-agent.test L7) are all depth 2→2 under (b) — safe.

KEY DEPTH FACT: moves (a) sandbox→loop|guard and (b) enforcement→checks PRESERVE depth (3→3, 2→2), so every resolve(HERE,'..'...) root constant survives those two moves untouched. Move (c) scripts→.system/sync/ changes depth 1→2 and breaks BOTH scripts' root constants plus setup-local-sync.sh L16. Move (d) touches no root constants, only 'harness/releases' literals.

SILENT-FAILURE modes the grep-gate must catch (they will NOT show up as red CI): (1) orchestrator/index.mjs L43 — a stale doctor path makes the 'doctor' handler return ok:true/errors:0 (empty stdout → findings:[] fallback), so 'os: drift' reports a HEALTHY harness forever; (2) no-ghost-agent L65/69 — stale sandbox imports are try/caught → the check passes vacuously; (3) doctor checkVersionBumpOnChange L459 — stale releases path fail-opens → version-bump enforcement silently off; (4) sync-supabase keyFile L32 — stale '..' means 'no key' → sync silently skips (matches the known Supabase sync-gap memory); (5) the installed launchd plist keeps the old absolute scripts/ path — external to the repo, re-run setup-local-sync.sh after (c); (6) reconciler gitDrift release probes fail-open to 'no drift'. Fail-CLOSED breaks (red CI immediately): doctor checkComponents (registry rows), checkReleaseConsistency L399, CI workflow steps, .claude hooks (harness governance of turns silently disappears — hooks error out fail-open).

LOOP/GUARD SPLIT CAVEAT for (a): sibling '../<comp>/' imports survive only if importer+importee stay in the SAME new folder. Import graph: session-feedback→{orchestrator,loop-store}; statusline→loop-store; pipeline→loop-store; reconciler→{loop-store,tracer}; orchestrator→{tracer,loop-store,classifier,estimator}; view/intake/sync→same-dir ledger. confinement and harness-lock import NOTHING cross-component (clean guard/ candidates). So guard/={confinement,harness-lock} + loop/=everything-else keeps all relative imports valid; any other split breaks them.

LOCKSTEP EDITS required per zone — (a): .claude/settings.json (3 commands), .claude/commands/{handoff,incident}.md, registry.json 15 rows (path+tests), no-ghost-agent L36/65/69, doctor L104 containment rule, workflows.pending/sync-signals.yml, environment.json L37, scripts/sync-supabase.mjs L26, investigator contract L33, harness.sb comment, CLAUDE.md/README.md, no-ghost-agent.test 'via sandbox' assertion, schema-validate.test L44. (b): CI ci.yml 4 steps, orchestrator L43, router L23, no-ghost-agent L37, registry harness-doctor row, CODEOWNERS L19, README L52/58-61. (c): both scripts' root constants, setup-local-sync.sh L16+L29 (+ reinstall launchd job), ci.yml L37 find list, doctor KNOWN_NON_HARNESS ('scripts' out, consider '.system'), structure-check EXPECTED list (WARN-only), registry L762. (d): doctor L399/L459, tracer L69, reconciler L49/L96, manifest.json L18, CODEOWNERS L17, doctor.test + reconciler.test releases fixtures. Not affected anywhere: record/, state/, docs/ literals, governance/{decisions,rules,permissions,architecture} paths, harness/{manifest,registry,contract.schema}.json locations, .gitignore entries (no move-zone paths in it).
keyFacts: Moves (a) and (b) PRESERVE root-derivation depth (3->3, 2->2): resolve(HERE,'..'*n) constants survive those moves; only move (c) scripts->.system/sync changes depth 1->2.
Move (d) touches no root constants, only 'harness/releases' string literals (doctor L399/L459, tracer L69, reconciler L49/L96, manifest.json L18, CODEOWNERS L17).
orchestrator/index.mjs L43 doctor-dispatch FABRICATES ok:true on empty stdout (missing doctor) - the flagship silent failure; killed by the P2 boot-root resolver + fail-loud handler (test C6).
no-ghost-agent L65/L69 swallow import failures -> vacuous pass; hardened fail-closed in P1 (test G5b).
structure-check EXPECTED_TOP_LEVEL_DIRS L17 lacks apps/skills/.system + always exits 0 (L88); hardened fail-closed in P1 (test G4).
.github/workflows.pending/sync-signals.yml references sandbox paths (dormant, update in lockstep).

doctor main-guard compares raw file:// (L572+); the other three checks use pathToFileURL - BOTH forms silently no-op under a symlinked argv[1] (macOS /var): any spawned-check rig MUST realpath (learned empirically, fixed in rig.mjs).
